name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Justice for all
body:
President Trump hosted a White House discussion yesterday with leaders from across America’s law enforcement community. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7edefacdfc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • June 9, 2020
---
| | |
# **How we heal our Nation**

**President Trump** **hosted** a White House discussion yesterday with leaders from across America’s law enforcement community. Together, they voiced a goal shared by President Trump: healing the divides between police and the communities they serve.

🎬 [President Trump: We won’t be defunding our police](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f88c39468a&e=3ee4985eea)

**“I don’t know** a law enforcement officer across this country who—who’s not just appalled by the incident that occurred in Minneapolis,” National Fraternal Order of Police President Pat Yoes said.

**“But that one incident** certainly doesn’t reflect on the 800,000 men and women across this country that go to work every single day and try and make their communities better.”

**These officers** believe there is an opportunity for real reform, as well. “It’s time for us to have some good, deep discussion, and look within and find ways to improve the criminal justice system,” Captain Yoes said.

**President Trump** believes in a fair justice system that protects every single American.

**On Friday** , Vice President Mike Pence sat down with African-American faith and community leaders at Hope Christian Church in Beltsville, Maryland. “It is undeniable that in the long struggle for equality in this country, people of faith have played the decisive role,” the Vice President said.

**“I couldn’t help** but feel that as our nation reels from the tragic death of George Floyd, that a place to start the conversation is in a place of worship.”

🎬 [Vice President Pence: Justice will be served](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=015fe04bce&e=3ee4985eea)

**Defunding the police** , as some far-left extremists now call for, would hurt the very communities we need to support. America’s violent crime and murder rates have fallen under President Trump, proving that law-and-order policies make our country safer.

**Justice for all** means enforcing the law fairly, not giving up on law enforcement. President Trump understands the difference, and responsible leaders will join him.

**Here are just a few** highlights from the conversations that have been happening inside the White House and across America over the past few days:

* **Daniel Cameron,** Kentucky Attorney General**:** [We all have a responsibility to become better citizens](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cb58f9683b&e=3ee4985eea)

* **Sheriff Tony Childress** of Livingston County, Illinois**:** [The best ideology is to be a friend to the community](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=58f2e5b069&e=3ee4985eea)

* **Scott Turner** of the White House Opportunity and Revitalization Council: [“Poverty doesn’t have a color. Poverty affects all of us.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ca02120e1f&e=3ee4985eea)

* **Vice President Pence:**[“Our focus now is on healing.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3373d3d5fe&e=3ee4985eea)

---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump walks to board Marine One** | June 5, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bbf7a3c817&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bb0b73b878&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=b4cfb8da01)

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/af06aea0d1a1/exclusive-new-ad-alert-9329484?e=5ac6ff05c3)
---
| |
---
| | Friends,

We have been working overtime to make sure we inform voters about Rep. Thomas Massie's record in Congress. Last night, I joined Renee Shaw on KET to discuss the many differences between myself and Thomas Massie. Not surprisingly, Rep. Massie declined all opportunities to join and defend his horrible record in Congress.
---
| Here are a few of the arguments I made:
* **_Massie is ineffective._** He's had ZERO bills signed into law and no progress has been made on the Brent Spence bridge and other infrastructure projects he promised to address.

* **_Massie has failed to support Trump's agenda._** Massie votes with Trump less than almost any other Republican, causing Trump to tweet that Massie should be "thrown out of the Republican Party."

* **_We disagree on policy._** Massie OPPOSED repealing Obamacare, OPPOSED funding the border wall, OPPOSED Trump on Iran, and OPPOSED Trump's plan to defund Planned Parenthood. I would have supported all of these bills.

* **_Customer service will be at the heart of my congressional office._** Massie isn't accessible to his constituents. I will be there, fighting for constituents just as I fought for Nick Sandmann.

---
| We are in the final stretch of this campaign - and we need your help to claim victory. Please consider a donation of $100, $50, or even $25. Then, forward this email to your family and friends. Ask them to do the same.

President Trump needs an ally in Washington and Thomas Massie isn't it.

Sincerely,
Todd McMurtry

P.S. Now is the time to make a difference in this race. Donate what you can - every dollar will go toward defeating Thomas Massie in the June 23 primary.
---

name: Team Hagerty
subject: #TeamHagerty Stands With Law Enforcement
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-e-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-jy/) June 9, 2020 **Hagerty Stands With Law Enforcement** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-r/) Over the past couple of weeks, we have seen criminals and anarchists hijack First Amendment protests with a campaign for violence and crime. Dismantling and defunding our police departments will throw our country into chaos. This is the wrong message to send. Our law enforcement officers put their lives on the line every single day to keep our communities safe. They are the only thing standing between anarchy and your family's safety. As the next Senator for Tennessee, Bill will work to uphold the rule of law, stop ANTIFA, and fight to secure appropriate funding and support for our law enforcement officers. Read Hagerty's full statement on supporting our law enforcement officers **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-y/)** **Bill Hagerty: Endorsed By SBA List** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-j/) Last week, Team Hagerty released the latest in a series of policy plans: **[Bill's Blueprint To Protect The Right To Life.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-t/)** Tennesseans value life; we believe that all people -- including the unborn -- are valued. In his plan, Bill details how he will protect the right to life from socialist Democrats in Washington.As the radical liberals look to implement their socialist agenda, which includes taxpayer-funded abortions, now more than ever we need conservative leaders in the Senate to protect our unborn children. That's why the Susan B. Anthony (SBA) List Candidate Fund PAC has joined President Trump in endorsing Bill's campaign. He has always said abortion takes a human life, and we must do everything we can to be a strong voice for the voiceless. Bill will stand up to end taxpayer-funded abortions and to defund Planned Parenthood once and for all. Find out more about SBA's endorsement **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-i/)** **RSVP: Tele-Townhall With Marilyn Musgrave** Team Hagerty announced today that the Honorable Marilyn Musgrave, Vice President of Government Affairs for the Susan B. Anthony (SBA) List Candidate Fund PAC will join us for a tele-town hall on **June 10th at 2:15 p.m. ET/1:15 p.m. CT.** The tele-town hall will focus on providing Tennesseans with an update on the SBA List's latest issue campaigns and how they are working to support the right to life. Click below to let us know you'll be listening! [RSVP FOR THE TELE-TOWN HALL](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-d/)
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-h/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-k/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-u/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[Breitbart:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-m/) **Former U.S. Ambassador to Japan Hagerty: Chinese Communist Using U.S. Unrest "To Retain Authoritarian Rule Over People"**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-c/) **Susan B. Anthony List Endorses Bill Hagerty for U.S. Senate[**TN Star:**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-q/) Bill Hagerty Calls On Donald Trump To Apply Insurrection Act To Rioters**[Williamson Homepage:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-a/)** Lara Trump to Tennessee voters: Bill Hagerty will 'help hold communist Chinese regime responsible' for COVID-19 pandemic
## **What They're Saying...**
> _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-f/) _" Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families."_
> [-Lara Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-z/) _" Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man."_
> [-Donald Trump Jr.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-v/)_" We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud."_
> [-Marilyn Musgrave](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-e/) _" We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revial. That's why we need Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Larry Kudlow](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-s/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-g/) _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-w/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-yd/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-yh/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-yk/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-yu/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-jl/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pjrhyn-fuutjhhtj-jr/)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Simona=20Grace?=
subject: Mitch McConnell The Grim Reaper
body:
More than 250 House-passed bills are buried in McConnell’s legislative graveyard including the 3 trillion coronavirus aid package we need now. | | | |
---
|
# Rent won't wait for McConnell to act
---
| [ ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=37fc3670d0&e=3f151f8b74)
---
McConnell's stimulus plan is skipping Americans who need aid the most. "He initially flatly rejected the House’s Heroes Act for more than a trillion dollars in state and local aid to mitigate the impact of the pandemic — despite a 14.7 percent unemployment rate as well as bipartisan support for more spending from governors, the Federal Reserve chair and the treasury secretary."
| | | [Chip in](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=4a71c00aca&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in")
---
|
###
I am asking-
**We need to elect new leaders who are responsive to the demands of the American people. **

The House passed the Heroes Act weeks ago. The legislation would provide 3 trillion to mitigate the effects of the pandemic, including $1 trillion for states and cities, “hazard pay” for essential workers, and a new round of cash payments to individuals.

**Do you know where the Heroes Act is? **

It is stuck in Mitch McConnell's legislative graveyard along with another 250 House-passed bills. Mothers don't have time to wait around to feed their children, rent is due for families who lost their jobs, and frontline workers who are putting their lives on the line every day deserve more than praise.

The lives of American people are on the line and Senate Leader McConnell refuses to take action on this critical piece of legislation with bipartisan support.

It is time to act and turn our country around and elect new leaders who will help working families. Moms in Office supports candidates who truly understand the struggles working families face each day. Help us elect these well-qualified, hard-working women who would put single mothers like me and working families first.

Our candidates would champion the kind of the bills McConnell rejected, buried, and continues to ignore.

[I am asking you for help](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=e1be832d30&e=3f151f8b74) so that we can continue to support the kind of leaders our country desperately needs in this moment of crisis and for the next 4 years.

**Too much is at stake. **

Election security, healthcare, workers protections, women's rights, these are just some of [250](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=86e5451011&e=3f151f8b74) bills passed[ ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=c84140553b&e=3f151f8b74)by the House are awaiting legislative action in the Senate.

**Imagine the country we could all live in if these bills passed? **

If you can, [chip](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=1cd942d117&e=3f151f8b74) in, please do. Every dollar counts.

With Gratitude,

Simona Grace
---

clean_body: More than 250 House-passed bills are buried in McConnell’s legislative graveyard including the 3 trillion coronavirus aid package we need now. | | | | | Rent won't wait for McConnell to act | McConnell's stimulus plan is skipping Americans who need aid the most. "He initially flatly rejected the House’s Heroes Act for more than a trillion dollars in state and local aid to mitigate the impact of the pandemic — despite a 14.7 percent unemployment rate as well as bipartisan support for more spending from governors, the Federal Reserve chair and the treasury secretary." | | | "Chip in" | I am asking- We need to elect new leaders who are responsive to the demands of the American people. The House passed the Heroes Act weeks ago. The legislation would provide 3 trillion to mitigate the effects of the pandemic, including $1 trillion for states and cities, “hazard pay” for essential workers, and a new round of cash payments to individuals. Do you know where the Heroes Act is? It is stuck in Mitch McConnell's legislative graveyard along with another 250 House-passed bills. Mothers don't have time to wait around to feed their children, rent is due for families who lost their jobs, and frontline workers who are putting their lives on the line every day deserve more than praise. The lives of American people are on the line and Senate Leader McConnell refuses to take action on this critical piece of legislation with bipartisan support. It is time to act and turn our country around and elect new leaders who will help working families. Moms in Office supports candidates who truly understand the struggles working families face each day. Help us elect these well-qualified, hard-working women who would put single mothers like me and working families first. Our candidates would champion the kind of the bills McConnell rejected, buried, and continues to ignore. so that we can continue to support the kind of leaders our country desperately needs in this moment of crisis and for the next 4 years. Too much is at stake. Election security, healthcare, workers protections, women's rights, these are just some of bills passed the House are awaiting legislative action in the Senate. Imagine the country we could all live in if these bills passed? If you can, in, please do. Every dollar counts. With Gratitude, Simona Grace | "Chip in! " | Another round of $1,200 checks to Americans is part of the House Democrats' $3-trillion coronavirus relief plan, but it awaits an uncertain future as the Senate will have its say. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | www.momsinoffice.org | | Copyright © 2020 Moms in Office, All rights reserved.

subject: STATEMENT FROM REP. NANCY MACE
body:
VICTORY STATEMENT | | | [View In Your Browser](https://us7.campaign-archive.com/?e=f1831b4ca2&u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=007078d367) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=007078d367&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=36d4223d95&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | Tonight a year of hard work and grassroots support culminated in a resounding primary victory for Republican nominee Nancy Mace.

After previously breaking glass ceilings as the first female graduate of The Citadel, Nancy Mace broke records for fundraising and grassroots reaction in her 30 point victory over four opponents, easily avoiding a runoff election.

The following is a statement from Rep. Nancy Mace:

“Today is a great day for a lot of reasons. For every independent thinker in the Lowcountry, it’s day one of our new mission - to unite together to take back the Lowcountry.

I insisted on running a positive campaign about the voters and their issues and why I was the best candidate to represent them.

I’m proud to say we did it.

My democrat opponent votes with Nancy Pelosi 85 percent of the time. That is not what most of the Lowcountry believes or deserves.

The fight to end Nancy Pelosi’s hold on our district starts tonight.

I have a message for my opponent, for Speaker Pelosi, for the National Democrat Party - I’m coming for you. We are coming for you. We are going to take back this seat for the Lowcountry.”
##

|

name: Bethany Torstenson
subject: Veterans for Makki Meet and Greet THIS FRIDAY!
body:
Team Makki,

Please join us for a Veterans focused Meet and Greet THIS Friday June 12th, with Amanda Makki and Chair of Veterans for Makki USMC Captain, Matt Tito. The event is open to all who would like to join.

The event will be held from 8-9:30 a.m at Mama’s Kitchen: 5885 Seminole Blvd in Seminole.

Thank you for your continued support and for being on #TeamMakki! You are the reason we will have a strong ground game to win the primary and take on Charlie Crist head to head this November!

We hope to see you on Friday!

Best,

Bethany

* * *
---
Dear Friend, An unfortunate truth of American politics is that __every__ campaign is judged in part by how much money it raises. We've seen a dramatic spike in fundraising over the last three weeks. The combination of an incumbent's retirement, weak Republican candidates, and the disastrous response to the events of 2020 have given us a clear and credible path to victory, and people are getting the message. But we can't rest on that success, we must build on it. The period for the next FEC report closes in two short weeks - June 24th. The press and the pundits analyze these reports. If we maximize this momentum, __now__ , it will snowball all the way to November. There's a sea-change coming. The costs of hyper-partisan divisive politics and an incompetent, ill-prepared federal government have been devastating. Americans deserve better. Texans deserve better. clean_body: | Rick Kennedy (D-Central Texas) is running for the open seat in the 17th District.= Dear Friend, An unfortunate truth of American politics is that every campaign is judged in part by how much money it raises. We've seen a dramatic spike in fundraising over the last three weeks. The combination of an incumbent's retirement, weak Republican candidates, and the disastrous response to the events of 2020 have given us a clear and credible path to victory, and people are getting the message. But we can't rest on that success, we must build on it. The period for the next FEC report closes in two short weeks - June 24th. The press and the pundits analyze these reports. If we maximize this momentum, now , it will snowball all the way to November. There's a sea-change coming. The costs of hyper-partisan divisive politics and an incompetent, ill-prepared federal government have been devastating. Americans deserve better. Texans deserve better. You deserve better. =. Friend,

Where have you been? I need your help.

We are making a card to celebrate our father’s birthday on June 14th. Our goal is to get 2 MILLION signatures from Patriots across the Country to help celebrate his big day, but we won’t be able to hit that goal without YOUR help.

The President tells me all the time that hearing from his supporters is the best part of his job, so I’m asking for your help to make his birthday special this year. The first 100 Patriots to sign the card can even leave a personal note for him to read.

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0e96630ce2880c800dad74808ed7886397c5577d64de2d7b17f1506d9ed882e717f3f24ab9014d1ef83cab5762ed9be470cc44ad17011df1
Please add your name NOW to the President’s Official Birthday Card to wish President Trump a happy birthday and to leave a short note. >>
http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0e96630ce2880c800dad74808ed7886397c5577d64de2d7b17f1506d9ed882e717f3f24ab9014d1ef83cab5762ed9be470cc44ad17011df1
You’ll see a lot of fake cards out there, but remember, this is the President’s ONLY Official Birthday Card, and I know he’ll be disappointed if you don’t sign it.

His birthday is just a few days away, so be sure to sign TODAY to help us CRUSH our goal of 2 MILLION signatures.

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0e96630ce2880c800dad74808ed7886397c5577d64de2d7b17f1506d9ed882e717f3f24ab9014d1ef83cab5762ed9be470cc44ad17011df1
Add your name by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to my father’s Official Birthday Card.
Thank you,

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0e96630ce2880c800dad74808ed7886397c5577d64de2d7b17f1506d9ed882e717f3f24ab9014d1ef83cab5762ed9be470cc44ad17011df1

Donald Trump Jr.

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0e96630ce2880c800dad74808ed7886397c5577d64de2d7b17f1506d9ed882e717f3f24ab9014d1ef83cab5762ed9be470cc44ad17011df1
SIGN THE CARD NOW >>

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.

You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com

Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we’re glad you’re on our team. It’s because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=a1bb0ec1354bdf9dc48d121593f638f6656c9e95f61cdaec9b99b6a35e414010542b96f17d08c07e786b9435f1fb4a76172c23b1b6f3fc3f

name: Sandra Sepulveda
subject: Tickets Still Available: Slay the Dragon: Movie Screening & Panel Discussion
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Slay-with-Pics-Facebook-Post.png]
Dear Peter,
There are still a few tickets left! Reserve your spot now! [https://tndp.org/slaythedragon/]
A secretive, high-tech gerrymandering initiative launched 10 years ago continues to undermine our democracy. SLAY THE DRAGON , a new and timely documentary film about gerrymandering in the United States, follows everyday people, outraged by what they see as an attack on the core democratic principle that every person’s vote should count equally.
As another round of redistricting approaches in Tennessee, the TNDP is hosting a virtual movie screening of SLAY THE DRAGON . We will watch the film together and then following the film, facilitate a panel discussion.
SLAY THE DRAGON
MOVIE SCREENING
&
POST-FILM PANEL DISCUSSION
with Special Guests
Barak Goodman & Chris Durrance
Slay the Dragon Film Directors
Kendra Lee
Redistricting fellow for the Memphis A. Philip Randolph Institute
Garrett Arwa
Director of Campaigns, National Democratic Redistricting Committee
Shehn Datta
Deputy States Director, National Democratic Redistricting Committee
Wednesday, June 10th, 2020
5:30 CT
Zoom Conference
Tickets: $25.00
Sponsorships: $100 & up
Buy a Ticket or Sponsor the Screening Now! [https://tndp.org/slaythedragon/]
Thank you to our sponsors!

| Friends, Last week our very own State Senator Ruth Ward of Stoddard was highlighted by the National Republican State Legislative Committee as part of their [2020 Candidate Spotlight series](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQwNDk1MDk0ODc5NzUzODQzJmM9ZzlvNSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTcxNTQwODImZD1lMGYycDB2.ChzZ31K6Xp00c5OAoB0czjQe9bZ0ek28LTMzlzgM92M)!

---
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| This is a huge deal! **No New Hampshire candidate has ever earned this honor before.** We all know how great of a strong, conservative voice Ruth has been for New Hampshire, and now the RSLC is highlighting how important it is that we help her get reelected this fall. Help us show the RSLC that they made the right choice to spotlight one our state's best legislators by[ donating $15, $25 or even $100 to her campaign](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQwNDk1MDk0ODc5NzUzODQzJmM9ZzlvNSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTcxNTQwODQmZD1vOHAwZDln.dFV-8X_0SiDBqb3mvpcYQpv28Nniv0th62MTI0hlMvA)! Thank you! \- NH GOP Senate Victory 2020 P.S. You can also donate to our campaign fund below and let us know which Senate District you would like to see your donation dedicated to winning for the GOP!
---
---

name: Nicole Revenaugh, Team Michelle
subject: ICYMI: Michelle and Kathleen Sebelius talk healthcare
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Friends,

Last month, Michelle De La Isla hosted a virtual Healthcare Town Hall with Secretary Kathleen Sebelius, and we were blown away by the excitement and turnout we saw! Over 100 attendees joined us for a thoughtful discussion about expanding access to affordable healthcare, improving rural healthcare, and so much more.

However, we ran into some technical challenges -- and we quickly hit our max capacity of attendees -- which meant not everyone who wanted to join was able to. That's why we put this video together to recap a great evening discussing ways to improve healthcare policy for Kansans and all Americans.

**[We want to make sure everyone has the opportunity to hear what Michelle and Secretary Sebelius had to say -- and here's your chance. Click here to watch highlights from our recent Healthcare Town Hall now and then share with your friends!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17813533/207467780/-605454982?v=2844019905720024&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDU3MjBmZi0yZmFiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sdi8xnpO3tUBRQFBBhcpl3q0jsFSTOV5ywBayDZkR8k=&emci=e89f2bf6-cea9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=e45720ff-2fab-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9593007)**

We're so grateful for everyone who joined us, and we look forward to finding other opportunities to connect with you throughout the summer!

Thanks,

Nicole

Nicole Revenaugh
Campaign Chair
Team Michelle

P.S. Putting on these virtual town halls takes resources, so if you can, **[please chip in $10 or more to help us make sure we can continue putting events like this together for our supporters across Kansas' 2nd District!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17813535/207467782/-265194322?gpsid=8_122_13330&refcode=em20_200608_hcvid_fnd_gq_act__nr_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200608_hcvid_fnd_gq_act__nr_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDU3MjBmZi0yZmFiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sdi8xnpO3tUBRQFBBhcpl3q0jsFSTOV5ywBayDZkR8k=)**

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Walz About to Extend Illegal Emergency Powers
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_about_to_extend_powers&n=1)
---
Peter -- **Minnesota is surrounded by states that are fully opened back up. Last I checked, the bodies aren't stacking up over there. So why are will still shut down Mr Walz???** At this point, we know that the Governor's actions in response to the coronavirus were not only based on bad modeling, they were also dangerous to the health of our state. His shutdown led to business closings and mass unemployment. They, in part, helped fuel the fire of chaos that occurred in Minneapolis. Now he is only "allowing" a partial reopening of Minnesota businesses. But that's not good enough. He's still just giving us crumbs! Every week that Walz' illegal shutdown continues, we lose more of our beloved restaurants, bars, resorts, gyms and hair salons. And the more people out of work, the more unrest we're likely to encounter anytime things go sideways in the process of seeking justice for George Floyd. Did you know that Walz' current emergency orders end this week? He's renewed his illegal orders two times already, which is the longest emergency declaration since WWII. In order to extend them for another month, he must call the Legislature back for a Special Session by Friday, June 12th. **That means the battle is back on to pass the Rep Jeremy Munson[Resolution to End Walz' Emergency Powers](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=HefBAOuut_7GNMMJOHLvU3FAqwF7BAxkH1Kx9oRvnc9JAmtupKmt_zNzxtjGYHPXVz1ttC1ntipqZ4BQWMd36og85hrnfah8qwvkmo-1Fg0&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_about_to_extend_powers&n=2). ** Back in April, we were successful at getting 100% Republican support in the Minnesota House. Before we unleash all hell on Democrat House members though, we need the weak-kneed Republicans in the Senate to do what's right, and pass the Munson Resolution on the Senate floor! It's unbelievable that Senate Majority Leader Paul Gazelka (who has a primary challenger now) **refused** to stand up for Minnesotans by passing the resolution before they adjourned in May. Our sources at the Capitol told us that the Senate Republicans secretly voted down bringing the resolution to the floor in one of their closed door meetings. How does that make you feel?! I think it's time your Senator heard from you. Contact him or her today and tell your State Senator to support the **Munson Resolution** to end Walz' emergency powers immediately. It's time to open Minnesota back up and stop Walz' unilateral orders.
## [SEE WHO REPRESENTS ME](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_about_to_extend_powers&n=3)
**In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_about_to_extend_powers&n=4).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_about_to_extend_powers&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_about_to_extend_powers&n=6), software for leaders.

The June 30th primary is coming up soon! It's officially crunch time, and our campaign is firing on all cylinders. Peter, The June 30th primary is coming up soon! It's officially crunch time, and our campaign is firing on all cylinders. We truly appreciate all of the support we have received so far. If you haven’t yet done so, **please share your support for our campaign with your friends on Facebook by adding our _NEW PHOTO FRAME_ to your profile picture!** [ ](http://links.oklahomaforhill.com/u/click?_t=3f8f472f46d84bffaa7cbc7593ac1005&_m=47a1e72285cd4f1db6f84190962b5454&_e=k91DAV8W23YUxkvucnHDAjNtQddHyBDdEvE3M2By_phaywB3sBTdUm5JxNGaYBQ2CBxTMgMaam3_u2y6jZmoIFvbRR2GsJjdalo6RLGgyhIlAjBzELcTVJSq_kxaAOjdE5nq-TH226QoIKw5Ied6czYpBzmRTanx0E-0yAD7dvWLBZMe8hPdmzSB9ztp_4zQS3HGHJysNQL3WbnMf4S2yy8xueST54yIadBC24E38_BACu2RdLGU9XlpVDqIcf40iCeW3bBcLqOmVrbmZMNv2ko2TYVUJXLh0t-iDWMhuio-yTX5K0BrQEwgMnXOnBLnTFtRNgyTHBPftrjC7wrjTggkANYOyc969lqYiiyg7qW2CcjGUiwf4H0_MfcQZzplS5NqywoVZmUykedRQ0oIi8jaQ5K3cTsEI62coEB_r5E%3D) | |

It’s super quick and easy to do. To show your support and add your new Facebook photo frame, just click on the button below!
[**Get your NEW _David Hill for Congress_ profile photo frame >>>**](http://links.oklahomaforhill.com/u/click?_t=3f8f472f46d84bffaa7cbc7593ac1005&_m=47a1e72285cd4f1db6f84190962b5454&_e=k91DAV8W23YUxkvucnHDAjNtQddHyBDdEvE3M2By_phaywB3sBTdUm5JxNGaYBQ2CBxTMgMaam3_u2y6jZmoIFvbRR2GsJjdalo6RLGgyhIlAjBzELcTVJSq_kxaAOjdE5nq-TH226QoIKw5Ied6czYpBzmRTanx0E-0yAD7dvWLBZMe8hPdmzSB9ztp_4zQS3HGHJysNQL3WbnMf4S2yxE5IRzb30bbZ7L0l8aaJUqkySc7ahlykLVT187QvEAd1lK3dsM2F-MpP3v5Wo8OaZR2xUcl_koRdGMKBCgVUT3NjdlxTf8uUIXFnb8PpBYKe7Io3-2tEsIkVWaRkA5lmiIDMoi2uwTNVBgrd_zBZyMxdxHoWaNBk_4IHDeVeIdRfOxiKjzJNn_RKHDFt_skcMQ5O07pXolsQPiYgSMpGGs%3D)
We need someone representing our voice in Washington with enough integrity to stand up to career politicians and their partisan, obstructionist agenda. clean_body: The June 30th primary is coming up soon! It's officially crunch time, and our campaign is firing on all cylinders. Peter, The June 30th primary is coming up soon! It's officially crunch time, and our campaign is firing on all cylinders. We truly appreciate all of the support we have received so far. If you haven’t yet done so, please share your support for our campaign with your friends on Facebook by adding our NEW PHOTO FRAME to your profile picture! | | It’s super quick and easy to do. To show your support and add your new Facebook photo frame, just click on the button below! We need someone representing our voice in Washington with enough integrity to stand up to career politicians and their partisan, obstructionist agenda. Unfortunately, Democrat politicians like Kendra Horn just go along to get along with Nancy Pelosi and special interests, no matter how badly it affects our economy or misrepresents our values. Our campaign is working hard to flip the House, fire Nancy Pelosi, and bring real representation to CD-5, but we can't win without continued support from American patriots like you. Please consider donating to our campaign today. If you'd like to join our team or get involved in our campaign, you can sign up for the Fight to Fix Congress by clicking the button below! We can't thank you enough for your support. With your help, we will flip this seat and Make CD-5 RED Again! Thanks again, Team Hill PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC | | | | ---|---|---|---

body:
---
| | **Peter (SIGNATURE MISSING):[Sign your name to PASS Universal Vote By Mail ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d043d/72412298/4c14ef55/61050ac0/3350635059/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/stand-with-president-obama-?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+Sign+your+name+to+PASS+Universal+Vote+By&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200610_ObamaVBM_U2_X3&source=VPP_EM_EN_200610_ObamaVBM_U2_X3")**

YES YES YES!
_But now Donald Trump wants to SHUT DOWN our Vote By Mail Movement!_

---
**Peter -- if we want to PASS Universal Vote By Mail, we need every Good Democrat to get up off the sidelines.**

| | | [SIGN YOUR NAME IF YOU SUPPORT UNIVERSAL VOTE BY MAIL ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d043d/72412298/4c14ef55/61050ac5/3350635059/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/stand-with-president-obama-?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+SIGN+YOUR+NAME+IF+YOU+SUPPORT+UNIVERSAL+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200610_ObamaVBM_U2_X3&source=VPP_EM_EN_200610_ObamaVBM_U2_X3")

body:

Peter,

The November election isn't in the bag (or the hat) by any means. With **34% of Texas voters undecided** , we have an unprecedented opportunity to defeat Sen. Cornyn and flip Texas -- **and the Senate**. But first we have to make sure MJ has the resources to win over all those voters!

**Texas is a huge state with 254 counties and 20 media markets** , so reaching these undecided voters is going to be expensive. **Sen. Cornyn has Big Pharma, the private prison industry, and the Koch network behind him** \-- but MJ's counting on grassroots supporters like you. **Will you pitch in today to help us reach the voters we need to flip Texas in November?**

name: Corky Messner
subject: Rand Paul is on my team!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
I’m proud to announce that I have Rand Paul’s support in my race for the U.S. Senate in New Hampshire. Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b3037788cef95e39/5498604ec7dea614c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, **I can’t tell you how happy I am to have the support of Rand Paul in my campaign for the U.S. Senate in New Hampshire**. He’s a proven leader in the Senate in the fight against federal overreach, defending our Constitution, and bringing reality to Washington. I’m looking forward to working with Senator Paul and President Trump to drain The Swamp! Rand knows I won’t be afraid to stand up against leftists like Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer to defend the Constitution. Here’s what he had to say about me: _Corky Messner is an outsider who understands the need for more leaders who will buck the status quo and defend the Constitution. He’s a businessman who knows how important it is to get our debt and deficit under control and our spending in check. He’s a veteran who has served our country honorably and believes, like President Trump and I do, that we must end the endless wars and take care of our veterans, who have sacrificed so much. _ **I am honored by his endorsement, and I will be honored to serve with him in the Senate to enact common sense conservative reforms and to _confirm Constitutional judges_**. Momentum for my campaign to defeat D.C. Jeanne Shaheen is growing, but we still have a long way to go. Will you chip in what you can now to STAND WITH RAND and support my campaign today? **[Chip in $5 to STAND WITH RAND>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b3037788cef95e39/38c323474f24e051c3d6b838967d376c/33153) **
**[Chip in $10 to STAND WITH RAND>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b3037788cef95e39/3d7ae1c83cbacc5ec3d6b838967d376c/33153) **
**[Chip in $25 to STAND WITH RAND>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b3037788cef95e39/0cd71c92ab5ce6d8c3d6b838967d376c/33153) **
**[Chip in $50 to STAND WITH RAND>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b3037788cef95e39/daf6af0f96ce7c94c3d6b838967d376c/33153) **
**[Chip in $100 to STAND WITH RAND>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b3037788cef95e39/79b5c0e2629bb773c3d6b838967d376c/33153) **
**[Chip in $250 to STAND WITH RAND>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b3037788cef95e39/12409c47ef74e589c3d6b838967d376c/33153) **
**[Chip in what you can to STAND WITH RAND>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b3037788cef95e39/7026d5c0951eb4ecc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** Democrats are getting scared, and they’re planning to pour in millions in outside money to try and keep this seat blue. They know that if we flip it RED, there is NO chance they will win a majority in the Senate. That’s why they are targeting this seat. It’s going to be a tough battle, but having Rand’s endorsement goes a long way towards getting the support we need to win BIG in the Granite State. **Every dollar we raise helps us get the word out to conservative voters and gets them to the polls. Will you help out by pitching in too?** We’re going to win, but only if we have help from people like you. Thanks for your support,
Corky Messner [STAND WITH RAND >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b3037788cef95e39/73a948d585530a6dc3d6b838967d376c/33153) id:2020-06-03-15:42:16:805t | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b3037788cef95e39/b350a55b133ab5bac3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b3037788cef95e39/a8b4da811ee4ae55c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

clean_body: I’m proud to announce that I have Rand Paul’s support in my race for the U.S. Senate in New Hampshire. Read more >> Peter, I can’t tell you how happy I am to have the support of Rand Paul in my campaign for the U.S. Senate in New Hampshire. He’s a proven leader in the Senate in the fight against federal overreach, defending our Constitution, and bringing reality to Washington. I’m looking forward to working with Senator Paul and President Trump to drain The Swamp! Rand knows I won’t be afraid to stand up against leftists like Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer to defend the Constitution. Here’s what he had to say about me: Corky Messner is an outsider who understands the need for more leaders who will buck the status quo and defend the Constitution. He’s a businessman who knows how important it is to get our debt and deficit under control and our spending in check. He’s a veteran who has served our country honorably and believes, like President Trump and I do, that we must end the endless wars and take care of our veterans, who have sacrificed so much. I am honored by his endorsement, and I will be honored to serve with him in the Senate to enact common sense conservative reforms and to confirm Constitutional judges. Momentum for my campaign to defeat D.C. Jeanne Shaheen is growing, but we still have a long way to go. Will you chip in what you can now to STAND WITH RAND and support my campaign today? Democrats are getting scared, and they’re planning to pour in millions in outside money to try and keep this seat blue. They know that if we flip it RED, there is NO chance they will win a majority in the Senate. That’s why they are targeting this seat. It’s going to be a tough battle, but having Rand’s endorsement goes a long way towards getting the support we need to win BIG in the Granite State. Every dollar we raise helps us get the word out to conservative voters and gets them to the polls. Will you help out by pitching in too? We’re going to win, but only if we have help from people like you. Thanks for your support, Corky Messner id:2020-06-03-15:42:16:805t | | | ---|--- PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Tell us about your voting experience in the June 9 election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
You deserve to vote and to be heard |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa478/34a064cc/1b86c4fa/70287f6/3729338089/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Hi Friend, What we saw yesterday throughout this state was a disaster of democracy. After warnings from county officials and voters like you, the incompetence and malfeasance of Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger was on full display. We saw lines that were too long, mail ballots that arrived too late, and machines malfunction. County officials and poll workers worked tirelessly to make voting safe and accessible, but they were left without proper training and resources from the state's top elections official. [Fair Fight Action is considering all options to ensure that voters do not face these same unconstitutional obstacles in November. We need your help to tell the story of what happened yesterday and document challenges faced by voters like you so that we can fight for every eligible Georgian's right to be heard. Whether you voted in person or by mail, will you share your voting experience by clicking here? ](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa478/34a064cc/1b86c4fa/70287f7/3729338089/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://bit.ly/GAVotePro") I was inspired by folks turning out to vote despite the obstacles and organizing virtually as we continue to practice social distancing. Many voters cast their ballots as a critical step to changing a racially biased criminal justice system. Voting doesn't fix everything, but together, you showed that we must vote to begin the work that will bring the systemic change we seek. November may seem far away, but we must act now to protect our elections and help our election officials run safe elections. No voter should have their ballot lost in the mail and no one should wait hours to vote in person. You can help us get there. [That's why I'm asking you to share your voting story, no matter what it is, by clicking here. Together, we can demand change at the ballot box to protect every eligible Georgian's right to vote in November. ](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa478/34a064cc/1b86c4fa/70287f7/3729338089/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://bit.ly/GAVotePro") Thank you, Stacey Abrams
Founder, Fair Fight Action P.S. Will you also consider a donation to help us redouble our efforts to protect the vote? Click [here](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa478/34a064cc/1b86c4fa/70287f4/3729338089/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june2020ga") if you are able to chip in and make our work possible. |
---|---|---

Friend,
We have huge news. Senator Bernie Sanders just endorsed our campaign!

name: Team Rita
subject: [flash poll] do you support vote-by-mail?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/86AWypJ1g-vdjyUKqqA0IDebEr8U4TN1j8Y8ubtDCZ0=/i5zPLXfE9V2W3Q5AuGWrqWDbltZ6K982TdQ3DRcCUhw=) Peter, We're so happy to hear about the record turnout in the recent primary election -- it just goes to show that if you make voting convenient for EVERYONE, more people participate. Especially during a pandemic, we need to make sure Iowans don't have to pick between their vote and their health. Now it looks like Republican officials, including Rita's opponent, are trying to make it harder to vote in November by putting restrictions on the very absentee balloting that made our record turnout possible. **[We made this flash poll in response to this shocking development. Do you want to keep our convenient vote-by-mail system that worked in the primary?](https://act.myngp.com/el/86AWypJ1g-vdjyUKqqA0IDebEr8U4TN1j8Y8ubtDCZ0=/i5zPLXfE9V2W3Q5AuGWrqWDbltZ6K982TdQ3DRcCUhw=)** | ****[YES](https://act.myngp.com/el/86AWypJ1g-vdjyUKqqA0IDebEr8U4TN1j8Y8ubtDCZ0=/i5zPLXfE9V2W3Q5AuGWrqWDbltZ6K982TdQ3DRcCUhw=)****

---
This shouldn't be a partisan issue. Rita knows that and spoke out against this measure on Twitter.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/86AWypJ1g-vdjyUKqqA0IDebEr8U4TN1j8Y8ubtDCZ0=/KVUWyBKParSnKBL4PP71X28D2C7yBYhXWsNo1SxOyjo=)
This kind of partisan-first leadership will make November harder for voters, auditors and poll workers. Now we want to hear directly from the voters:
**[Take our flash poll: Do you want to KEEP the vote-by-mail program that helped us break turnout records in the Primary Election?](https://act.myngp.com/el/86AWypJ1g-vdjyUKqqA0IDebEr8U4TN1j8Y8ubtDCZ0=/KVUWyBKParSnKBL4PP71X28D2C7yBYhXWsNo1SxOyjo=)**

The Washington Post just announced that the Republican National Convention is likely to move its massive August event to Florida.

It’s no coincidence that President Trump is eyeing the Sunshine State — his re-election and success are dependent on us and our historically razor-thin margin of victory.

It’s no surprise Trump found a willing ally in Governor DeSantis as he was searching for someone willing to disregard CDC guidelines and put his own community at risk in order to host what amounts to a giant party.

**[So, we want to know what you think of this potential move — should the GOP move their convention to Florida?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17817910/207547569/-54394814?contactdata=eR4AHFArImB40Z%2FklGWpoU%2FFNq5AdWJmL0yqzEfVqq2LmzXYbVQIuzG37e%2BE6c1jtf4GfuOz3U2ycXjxwuS1JAc4hgSyKh7YxrAqLUxDr5eQgBGnStK65AUxXrvMhH2BIPMP62j%2FrD7PI%2BVYCZj%2FMg%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzczN2UwNS00ZmFiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RJnkcYaunlPQkFuGez7xEpMMuWall30QT2JTsGPUP34=&emci=59860f23-42ab-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=e7737e05-4fab-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)** | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17817911/207547570/-54394814?contactdata=eR4AHFArImB40Z%2FklGWpoU%2FFNq5AdWJmL0yqzEfVqq2LmzXYbVQIuzG37e%2BE6c1jtf4GfuOz3U2ycXjxwuS1JAc4hgSyKh7YxrAqLUxDr5eQgBGnStK65AUxXrvMhH2BIPMP62j%2FrD7PI%2BVYCZj%2FMg%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzczN2UwNS00ZmFiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RJnkcYaunlPQkFuGez7xEpMMuWall30QT2JTsGPUP34=&emci=59860f23-42ab-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=e7737e05-4fab-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17817912/207547571/-54394814?contactdata=eR4AHFArImB40Z%2FklGWpoU%2FFNq5AdWJmL0yqzEfVqq2LmzXYbVQIuzG37e%2BE6c1jtf4GfuOz3U2ycXjxwuS1JAc4hgSyKh7YxrAqLUxDr5eQgBGnStK65AUxXrvMhH2BIPMP62j%2FrD7PI%2BVYCZj%2FMg%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzczN2UwNS00ZmFiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RJnkcYaunlPQkFuGez7xEpMMuWall30QT2JTsGPUP34=&emci=59860f23-42ab-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=e7737e05-4fab-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)

Margaret has the chance to flip a seat that will allow the Democrats to take back Florida in November. We have to show them that we’re standing up for our communities and for our health.

Thanks so much for your input — we’ll keep you posted as we hear more.

Alex Koren
Campaign Manager
| Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. _We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us._

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. **[If you'd like to donate, click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17817913/207547572/788213855?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzczN2UwNS00ZmFiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RJnkcYaunlPQkFuGez7xEpMMuWall30QT2JTsGPUP34=)**

If you’d like to volunteer, **[click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17817914/207547573/192916899?contactdata=eR4AHFArImB40Z%2FklGWpoU%2FFNq5AdWJmL0yqzEfVqq2LmzXYbVQIuzG37e%2BE6c1jtf4GfuOz3U2ycXjxwuS1JAc4hgSyKh7YxrAqLUxDr5eQgBGnStK65AUxXrvMhH2BIPMP62j%2FrD7PI%2BVYCZj%2FMg%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzczN2UwNS00ZmFiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RJnkcYaunlPQkFuGez7xEpMMuWall30QT2JTsGPUP34=&emci=59860f23-42ab-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=e7737e05-4fab-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)**

name: Jim Inhofe
subject: Lockdowns are ending, Americans are returning to work, but China must be held accountable.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jim Inhofe](https://click
body:
| |
---
Right now, our country is hurting from the economic impact of the coronavirus. More than 20 million Americans have lost their jobs, including tens of thousands in Oklahoma. I’m confident we’ll turn it around—just look at last month’s jobs report—but make no mistake: coronavirus has hurt our economy. | [View in browser](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQwNjMzOTIwNzQ2OTUyMTkyJmM9azh2NCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTcyNzM5NTYmZD1qOHQ1ZzBk.WOU9yvw-zOkNbH-t9taIsf8ZWJSTPJgcLxgZlqlLhmI)
| | | | [ ](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQwNjMzOTIwNzQ2OTUyMTkyJmM9azh2NCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTcyNzM5NTgmZD1hM2o3cDdp.9vos2brVympo7efCZEwDPvf1LS5Ej5wFvItp0FD9yl0)
---
---
| |
---
| Hi - Right now, our country is hurting from the economic impact of the coronavirus. More than 20 million Americans have lost their jobs, including tens of thousands in Oklahoma. I’m confident we’ll turn it around—just look at last month’s jobs report—but make no mistake: coronavirus has hurt our economy. Democrats want to point fingers at the president, but the blame is squarely with China. Why? The communist Chinese government covered up the COVID-19 outbreak for MONTHS, costing us time to prepare for and contain the virus. When it reached the United States, state governments were left with no choice but to temporarily lock down their economies. **We need to hold China accountable for their behavior.**
[**I've introduced The COVID-19 Accountability Act in the Senate to make sure the communist Chinese government doesn't get away scot-free. Help me make China pay for what they've done to our country by donating $25 to our campaign right now.**](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQwNjMzOTIwNzQ2OTUyMTkyJmM9azh2NCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTcyNzM5NjAmZD1hOXA0ZTV1.AseF3H3KUHbdbfPuJNHQaq0IrJSqSowMNe7f_tFwLzQ)
---
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQwNjMzOTIwNzQ2OTUyMTkyJmM9azh2NCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTcyNzM5NjImZD1oOGcwbzNr.QQWh-AhnCasH5Rm7GxV4Z_2i7frH4r43M1JXYv-1mwg)
---
---
| |
---
| China lied about the origin of the virus. China tried to cover up the initial outbreak. China lied about how the virus spread. China hid information from the World Health Organization. China did not stop international air travel from their country. While they were lying about the severity of the virus, China hoarded medical supplies. **I will not rest until China is held accountable for their actions, but I can’t do it alone******[**I need the support of American patriots like you to continue fighting for sanctions. Join our campaign right now with a quick $40 donation that will fuel my fight for accountability.**](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQwNjMzOTIwNzQ2OTUyMTkyJmM9azh2NCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTcyNzM5NjQmZD1tNW00YjF2.XeKfSXkVKVQeasTi2ZG-ZF2MjBq8iRkik7wFpQfEFUo) There is no excuse for China’s deceit and recklessness. China must pay—but it won’t be easy. Liberal Democrats are going to fight me every step of the way, just as they fought President Trump on his travel restrictions to stop the spread of the virus and defunding the World Health Organization for their complicity in China’s coverup. It's going to be a tough fight, but with you behind me, we can get this legislation across the finish line and make China pay for what they've done. I'm counting on your support today to make that possible.
---
---
| |
---
| | [DONATE](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQwNjMzOTIwNzQ2OTUyMTkyJmM9azh2NCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTcyNzM5NjgmZD1nMWI1eTJj.Gu_tl_Lqe2Bt2fyTGGwaAEkhHVLkvW07ERPcEcs5QIE)

---

| Jim Inhofe

clean_body: | | Right now, our country is hurting from the economic impact of the coronavirus. More than 20 million Americans have lost their jobs, including tens of thousands in Oklahoma. I’m confident we’ll turn it around—just look at last month’s jobs report—but make no mistake: coronavirus has hurt our economy. | | | | | | | | Hi - Right now, our country is hurting from the economic impact of the coronavirus. More than 20 million Americans have lost their jobs, including tens of thousands in Oklahoma. I’m confident we’ll turn it around—just look at last month’s jobs report—but make no mistake: coronavirus has hurt our economy. Democrats want to point fingers at the president, but the blame is squarely with China. Why? The communist Chinese government covered up the COVID-19 outbreak for MONTHS, costing us time to prepare for and contain the virus. When it reached the United States, state governments were left with no choice but to temporarily lock down their economies. We need to hold China accountable for their behavior. | | | | | | China lied about the origin of the virus. China tried to cover up the initial outbreak. China lied about how the virus spread. China hid information from the World Health Organization. China did not stop international air travel from their country. While they were lying about the severity of the virus, China hoarded medical supplies. I will not rest until China is held accountable for their actions, but I can’t do it alone**** There is no excuse for China’s deceit and recklessness. China must pay—but it won’t be easy. Liberal Democrats are going to fight me every step of the way, just as they fought President Trump on his travel restrictions to stop the spread of the virus and defunding the World Health Organization for their complicity in China’s coverup. It's going to be a tough fight, but with you behind me, we can get this legislation across the finish line and make China pay for what they've done. I'm counting on your support today to make that possible. | | | | | | | | | | Thank you and God Bless, | Jim Inhofe | | mailto:U.S. Senator | | ---|--- tel:Oklahoma | | | | | | Contributions to Friends of Jim Inhofe Committee are not deductible as charitable donations for tax purposes. name: Bill Olson
subject: Defund the police? NO!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hzLa2rJxZ_6OuRU&b=YHUf9.uT1VRFVNjnfBZYng

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back a Swing district- Florida’s 9th District, currently held by embattled liberal Democrat Darren Soto.

I've seen things in our country over the last two weeks that I never thought I'd see. The left’s fear that Trump is Hitler has made them all Stalin and they are utterly blind to it!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hzLa2rJxZ_6OuRU&b=YHUf9.uT1VRFVNjnfBZYng

Following the tragic death of George Floyd in Minneapolis, the Left- led by domestic terrorism organization Antifa- engaged in riots in dozens of American cities (including some in Florida).

These riots were destructive and lethal. They resulted in burning hundreds of buildings, homes and businesses- largely in black neighborhoods. Over 150 people died, including two dozen police officers. Over 100 more officers were hospitalized with wounds.

The attacks were brutal and barbaric.

Police are looking for four men who assaulted NYPD cops in two separate Manhattan incidents amid the George Floyd protests this week — including one suspect who threw a brick at a lieutenant and another who tossed a fire extinguisher at a cop.

The NYPD said the lieutenant and another officer were trying to arrest protesters Sunday around 10:30 p.m. outside the Strand Bookstore, two blocks from Union Square, when two men threw a brick at the lieutenant and hit the second officer with a stick, cellphone video shows.

Lt. Jorge Rodriguez told NBC 4 News on Tuesday that he "felt like I got shot.”

Another cop was lit on fire by rioters. Three black cops were killed by rioters, which I guess means that black lives really didn't matter to the rioters.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hzLa2rJxZ_6OuRU&b=YHUf9.uT1VRFVNjnfBZYng

So you see how the radical Left values the police. Basically, they want the police to enforce their draconian Socialist edicts and take on all the risk to their lives and families... and then defund them.

That's right. The new call from the radical Left- and their Democrat allies in Congress- is to defund the police. Some, in certain cities like Minneapolis, don't just want to reduce the police funding- they want to do away with the police entirely!

Democratic Rep. Ilhan Omar went beyond calls to defund the police following the death of George Floyd, instead calling for dismantling the Minneapolis Police Department because it is “rotten to the root.”

Protesters and members of Black Lives Matter have chanted “defund the police” during the nationwide demonstrations over Floyd’s death on May 25.

“We need to completely dismantle the Minneapolis Police Department. Because here’s the thing, there’s a cancer,” she said, continuing that amputation is needed so it doesn’t spread.

“The Minneapolis Police Department is rotten to the root, and so when we dismantle it, we get rid of that cancer, and we allow for something beautiful to rise, and that reimagining allows us to figure out what public safety looks like for us,” Omar, a first-term congresswoman, said.

It is important to understand, that any policy promoted by Ilhan Omar is NOT, in general, a policy that would benefit America. She's a dangerous traitor.

But this particular reckless policy- defunding or doing away with the police- is a critical error that would destroy society as we know it.

Think about it for a moment. If your daughter is raped, who would you call? A municipal "conflict negotiator"?

If someone broke into your home with a knife, will you call a "community healer"?

Recently, an "expert" guest on CNN said that if you're worried about your safety, that's just "white privilege".

Really? These people are nuts!

I tell you what, if you're in one of these cities, buy your guns now! Because your safety is in danger with Democrat leadership like this.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hzLa2rJxZ_6OuRU&b=YHUf9.uT1VRFVNjnfBZYng

Are you angry yet? Are you concerned for your fellow citizens who want to be safe?

I say, ENOUGH! I will stand for the defenseless, even as the Democrats try to destroy our civilization in the name of political correctness.

I stand with the brave police and first responders! I think those who have laid the most on the line for our country and its citizens- whose who have taken an Oath to defend the Constitution- are the ones best fit to defend our Constitution in Congress.

Me, I’m not a career politician. I don't have fancy refrigerators full of $15 designer ice cream, like Nancy Pelosi. And I can't afford my own private security like the limousine liberals do!

I earned my education in the Cold War frontiers of Germany and South Korea, as well as the battlefields of Kuwait, Iraq, and Afghanistan. That's why I'm 100% behind the President's "America First" policies!

Let's be clear- there is NO Republican win in 2020 without Florida.

Florida is so pivotal. The electoral votes, along with so many Republican-leaning and swing congressional districts, make this state of paramount importance. Plus, it's now President Trump's home state!

Perhaps you agree with me, that we need more Bible, more Constitution, more safety- and less crazy liberal Democrats like Darren Soto.

If so, then I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hzLa2rJxZ_6OuRU&b=YHUf9.uT1VRFVNjnfBZYng

Darren Soto will have all of Nancy Pelosi's Swamp money. That's why I need your help today- to replace Darren Soto, and support the President!

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hzLa2rJxZ_6OuRU&b=YHUf9.uT1VRFVNjnfBZYng

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hzLa2rJxZ_6OuRU&b=YHUf9.uT1VRFVNjnfBZYng
of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple? I need whatever you can send so we can defeat socialist Darren Soto!

The Democrats are going to lose this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hzLa2rJxZ_6OuRU&b=YHUf9.uT1VRFVNjnfBZYng

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hzLa2rJxZ_6OuRU&b=YHUf9.uT1VRFVNjnfBZYng

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hzLa2rJxZ_6OuRU&b=YHUf9.uT1VRFVNjnfBZYng
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hzLa2rJxZ_6OuRU&b=YHUf9.uT1VRFVNjnfBZYng
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

body:
"We’re in the dawn of a high-tech, bloodless Cultural Revolution; one that relies on intimidation, public shaming, and economic ruin to..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8c09512eb7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Even in the Opinion Section, Only Approved Thought is Permitted**

“We’re in the dawn of a high-tech, bloodless Cultural Revolution; one that relies on intimidation, public shaming, and economic ruin to dictate what words and ideas are permissible in the public square,” David Harsanyi writes for _National Review_.

“‘Words are violence’ has always been an illiberal notion meant to stifle speech and open discourse. Popularized by a generation of coddled and brittle college students, it now guides policy on editorial pages at newspapers such as the Philadelphia Inquirer, the New York Times, and most major news outlets.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=29a3b93924&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Minneapolis was a beautiful city with a promising future and unlimited potential. Gateway to the ‘Land of 10,000 Lakes.’ Home of the Mall of America and a top tourist destination for sports fans, families, and college students. Notice I say was,” Tom Tradup writes. “Because over the past two weeks Minneapolis has pretty much hung out the ‘Going Out Of Business’ sign on the outskirts of town.” Read more in _[Townhall](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3c4512ef17&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|
---
| “Attorneys general across the country are pushing back on calls to defund law enforcement agencies in the wake of the protests over police brutality and racial injustice–arguing that cutting budgets to police departments would be ‘extremely dangerous and reckless,’” Andrew O’Reilly writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=49d8fdff98&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “For the first time in history, half of the senior leaders of the National Security Council are women . . . While the White House press corps has not yet noticed that fact, and Vanity Fair didn’t have Annie Leibovitz come do a photo shoot, as would have been obligatory in the previous administration, women in the White House noticed and appreciated the historic first,” Madeline Osburn writes in [_The Federalist_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0aab0d4dec&e=3ee4985eea).

name: Kathy Manning
subject: 1OO,OOO SIGNATURES NEEDED:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Our democracy is at risk.
|
---

| | In April, Wisconsin went ahead with in-person voting for its primary election. As a result, counties with a higher voting concentration saw higher rates of positive coronavirus tests.

And just _yesterday_ , primary voters in Georgia experienced long lines, broken machines, and many have been unable to exercise their constitutional right to vote. **We can 't allow for that to happen on a national scale. We need to institute a universal vote-by-mail option before the November general election.** **100,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED:
[_Add your name now ->_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d324/3d199a51/2f433da1/7364c9c2/3891165352/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200602_a")** Our government needs to work for everyone. But right now, Washington is broken. And there are two major contributing factors: _**dark money in politics and rampant voter suppression.**_ I'm proud to be endorsed by End Citizens United and Let America Vote, two organizations that are fighting to take big money out of politics and protect Americans' constitutional right to vote. Their efforts are more vital than ever as the coronavirus threatens both Americans' health and the integrity of our democracy. [_**Together, we 're teaming up to demand that Congress provide a universal, no-excuse vote-by-mail option before November, but we need 100,000 grassroots supporters to join us. Will you sign our petition?**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d324/3d199a51/2f433da1/7364c9c2/3891165352/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200602_a") Thank you, Kathy |

body:
We are in the midst of unprecedented times in our nation. A pandemic is decimating our economy and putting millions of people on the unemployment rolls as frontline workers struggle for resources and put their lives at risk. Our country is struggling more than ever to heal our racial divides and make our society and our government more just and equitable.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17819715/207587867/1700156400?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.10_SPK_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWIzMzhkNy01ZWFiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DxAZ7M33yLY1UyMTPrmVDiWAW2qpAyI6E5lQURZRN9w=)

| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17819716/207587868/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWIzMzhkNy01ZWFiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DxAZ7M33yLY1UyMTPrmVDiWAW2qpAyI6E5lQURZRN9w=&emci=7c802daa-53ab-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=7eb338d7-5eab-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *
Hi Team,
We are in the midst of unprecedented times in our nation. A pandemic is decimating our economy and putting millions of people on the unemployment rolls as frontline workers struggle for resources and put their lives at risk. Our country is struggling more than ever to heal our racial divides and make our society and our government more just and equitable.

And in the middle of all this, families still can’t afford to pay their bills and get access to healthcare for their children. Social Security is still at risk of insolvency. College tuition is still out of reach for many hardworking students.

[**I’m running for Congress to meet the moment we’re in -- and with you by our side, I know we can win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17819717/207587869/2147176479?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.10_SPK_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWIzMzhkNy01ZWFiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DxAZ7M33yLY1UyMTPrmVDiWAW2qpAyI6E5lQURZRN9w=)
| [GIVE $15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17819718/207587870/2147176479?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.10_SPK_b1_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWIzMzhkNy01ZWFiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DxAZ7M33yLY1UyMTPrmVDiWAW2qpAyI6E5lQURZRN9w=) | [GIVE $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17819719/207587871/2147176479?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.10_SPK_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWIzMzhkNy01ZWFiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DxAZ7M33yLY1UyMTPrmVDiWAW2qpAyI6E5lQURZRN9w=)
